title: AI Automations Specialist
description:
Part Time AI Automations Specialist for The Business of Dance - 

Remote | Flexible Hours | Immediate Start Preferred



We are looking for a highly skilled and proactive AI Automations Specialist to help streamline, optimize, and automate as much of our business as possible.



This is a part time remote role with flexible hours, ideal for someone who is passionate about AI, systems, workflow optimization, and finding smarter ways to run an online business. We are looking for someone who is not only technical, but also creative, detail oriented, and constantly thinking ahead.



This role will start as part time and has the potential to grow into a full time position for the right person as the business and systems continue to expand.



The role is expected to be up to 20 hours per week to start. Compensation can be structured either as an hourly rate or as a flat monthly part time rate, depending on experience, skill level, and overall fit. We are open to discussing a structure that makes sense for both sides.



About the Role

You will be responsible for maintaining our current automations, improving existing systems, troubleshooting issues, and continuously identifying new opportunities to automate team workflows, client experience, sales processes, communication, and backend operations.



We want someone who stays current with the latest AI tools and automation trends and can bring fresh ideas to the table. You should be excited by the idea of helping build a business that runs smarter, faster, and with less manual work.



Key Responsibilities

Maintain and troubleshoot existing automations and workflows

Build new automations using platforms such as Zapier, Make, and AI powered tools

Integrate and optimize systems across platforms including Notion, Calendly, Zoom, Stripe, Typeform, JotForm, Fathom, Quo, Mailerlite and other business tools

Continuously identify inefficiencies and propose better automated solutions

Help automate internal team workflows, follow up systems, sales support systems, onboarding, and operational tasks

Suggest innovative ways to reduce manual work and improve communication across the business

Support future AI initiatives such as building an AI phone receptionist and more advanced AI driven systems

Explore how tools like Claude Code and other emerging technologies can be used to automate 75 percent or more of the business over time

Document workflows and clearly communicate how automations are set up and maintained

Ensure systems are reliable, organized, and easy for the team to use



Who We Are Looking For

Someone who is highly experienced or very confident with:

Zapier

Make

AI automation tools

Notion integrations

Calendly

Zoom

Stripe

Typeform

JotForm

Fathom

Quo

Wix

API connections and workflow logic



We are looking for someone who is:



Very detail oriented

Tech savvy and resourceful

Innovative and forward thinking

A strong communicator

Able to take initiative without needing constant direction

Organized and dependable

Able to think both strategically and practically

Excited about using AI to transform how a business operates



Ideal Candidate

The ideal person for this role does not just wait to be told what to do. They actively look for areas where time is being wasted, tasks are being repeated, or human effort can be reduced through smarter systems. They enjoy problem solving, experimenting, and building efficient solutions that actually work in real life.



You should be comfortable both maintaining what already exists and dreaming up what is possible next.



Compensation Structure

Compensation is open and can be structured either as hourly part time work or as a flat monthly retainer, depending on experience, efficiency, and fit.



How to Apply

Please respond with the following:



Your experience with AI tools, automations, and workflow systems

The platforms you have worked with, especially Zapier, Make, Notion, Stripe, Calendly, Zoom, JotForm, Typeform, Fathom, Wix and Quo

Examples of automations or systems you have built or managed

Your level of familiarity with newer AI tools and technologies



Your communication style and availability

Why you think you would be a strong fit for this role

We are looking to hire soon, so an immediate response is greatly appreciated.



This role will start as part time and has the potential to grow into a full time position for the right person.

title: Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Digital Product Setup Assistant (Framer + Stripe + Content Upload)
description:
I need a reliable assistant to help set up a series of digital products and artwork pages on my website. This is a short-term project that involves repeating a simple process for multiple items.



My current assistant has already tested the workflow, and each product takes approximately 20–30 minutes to complete once you understand the process.  There are about 50 products



This project is ideal for someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with website builders and simple online tools.

Website:?regenesisproject.one



Primary Task: Digital Product Setup

I have two types of digital products:

• Guided audio meditations?• Zoom workshop recordings

Each product requires the following steps:

1. Create a product section on my website (built on : 
)?• Upload thumbnail image?• Add title and short description

2. Create the product in Stripe

3. Connect the confirmation

4. Add the download or access link

The process will be demonstrated, and once learned it becomes a simple repeatable workflow.



Secondary Task: Artwork Presentation Pages

I also have approximately 25 pieces of artwork that need to be displayed on my website.

Tasks include:

• Creating thumbnail images?• Adding pop-up views for each piece?• Organizing them neatly on the page

These are not products for sale, just visual presentation, so the process is simpler and faster.



Skills Needed

• Comfortable working with website builders (Framer or similar)?• Basic image handling / thumbnails?• Experience with Stripe or payment systems is helpful??Start: immediately and need done in 5 days

If the collaboration goes well, there will be opportunities for additional work in the future.



When applying, please include:

• Your experience with website builders and Stripe?• Examples of similar work if available





Please include the word “Coherence” at the beginning of your application so I know you have carefully read this job description.



Also briefly answer the following:

1. Have you ever worked with Framer or another website builder? Please explain.

2. Have you ever set up digital products or payment links using Stripe or another platform?



Applications that do not follow the instructions above will not be considered.

title: Direct Response Video Ad Editor — Ongoing Work (Meta/Facebook Ads)
description:
IMPORTANT: Applications without video ad examples will be ignored. You MUST include links to 2-3 paid ads you have edited. No exceptions.



We're a marketing agency creating paid ads for clients in the health/beauty space (Dutch market). We need a video editor who can produce high-converting ad creatives on an ongoing basis.



Important note: The ads are in Dutch. You do NOT need to speak Dutch — all voiceovers are handled via AI (ElevenLabs) and you'll receive scripts/text pre-translated. Your job is editing only.



What you'll do:

• Edit short-form video ads (15-60 seconds) for Meta/Facebook

• Create hook variations of existing winning ads (swap first 3 seconds, keep body)

• Build ads from templates — AI voiceover, stock footage, testimonial-style formats

• Follow SOPs and creative briefs exactly

• Deliver 3-5 ad variations per client per week

• Quick turnaround — 24-48 hours per batch



Requirements:

• Experience editing paid ad creatives (not vlogs, not YouTube — ads that sell)

• Portfolio showing direct response / performance marketing work

• Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

• Can follow a template/SOP without hand-holding

• Reliable, communicates proactively, meets deadlines

• Available 15-25 hours/week (flexible, paid per deliverable)



Nice to have:

• Experience with ElevenLabs or AI voiceover tools

• Understanding of hooks, CTAs, and ad fatigue

• Has edited ads in non-English markets



Compensation:

• $10-$20 per ad creative (based on complexity)

• Consistent ongoing work — volume increases as we scale

• Paid test required before hiring (3 ad variations, compensated at $15)



To apply:



1. Send 2-3 examples of paid ads you've edited (not brand content — ads). Applications without examples will not be reviewed.

2. Tell me your turnaround time for a batch of 5 ad variations

3. What editing software do you use?

title: Education Franchise Business Development Manager
description:
Business Development Executive

Franchise & Licensing Growth  •  Remote  •  Full-Time



Department	Franchise & Licensing

Reports To	Head of Partnerships / CEO

Location	Remote (anywhere) — occasional travel may be required

Employment Type	Full-Time

Experience Required	Minimum 2 years in B2B sales, business development, or education industry



ABOUT RIPPLE CREATE

Ripple Create is a coding and robotics academy dedicated to nurturing the next generation of innovators, aged 5 to 18. Through hands-on, curriculum-aligned programmes, we empower young learners to design, build, and code — preparing them for a technology-driven future. We are rapidly expanding our reach through franchise and licensing partnerships across the region and beyond.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We are looking for a driven and self-motivated Business Development Executive to lead the growth of our franchise and licensing network. In this remote-based role, you will own the full partnership lifecycle — from generating and qualifying leads through marketing channels, to nurturing prospects, coordinating technical demonstrations, closing agreements, and supporting new partners through their first six months of operation. This is a high-impact, end-to-end commercial role ideal for someone with a passion for education and a proven track record in consultative sales.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Lead Generation & Marketing Channel Management

•	Manage and optimise franchise and licensing marketing portals, listings, and digital channels (e.g. franchise directories, social media, paid ads,
 campaigns).

•	Monitor inbound enquiries across all channels and respond promptly to maintain lead 
ntum.

•	Work with the marketing team to develop compelling collateral and messaging targeting prospective franchisees and licensees.



CRM Management & Lead Administration

•	Accurately enter, update, and maintain all leads and prospect interactions in the CRM system in a timely manner.

•	Track pipeline stages, flag at-risk leads, and maintain a clean, up-to-date database.

•	Generate regular reports on lead volume, conversion rates, and pipeline health for management review.



Lead Nurturing, Qualification & Sales Process

•	Proactively nurture prospects through personalised outreach, follow-up calls,
s, and virtual meetings.

•	Qualify leads against defined criteria (financial capacity, market fit, operational readiness) to prioritise pipeline.

•	Guide prospects through the sales journey, addressing objections and providing relevant information and case studies.

•	Coordinate and schedule technical demonstrations with the Sales Trainer, ensuring prospects are well-prepared and engaged.

•	Follow through on all stages of the deal process, working collaboratively toward signed agreements.



Post-Sales Partner Support (First 6 Months)

•	Serve as the primary point of contact for new franchise and licensing partners from signing through the first six months of operations.

•	Coordinate onboarding activities, training schedules, and resource access with internal teams.

•	Proactively check in with partners to resolve issues, gather feedback, and ensure a smooth launch.

•	Facilitate a structured handover to the Account Manager at the end of the six-month post-sales period.



REQUIREMENTS

•	Experience: Minimum 2 years of experience in B2B sales, business development, franchise development, or a related field; experience in the education sector is a strong advantage.

•	Sales Acumen: Demonstrated ability to manage a full sales cycle from lead generation to closing, with a consultative, relationship-first approach.

•	CRM Proficiency: Hands-on experience using CRM platforms (e.g. HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, or similar); disciplined in data entry and pipeline management.

•	Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English; ability to adapt tone and style for diverse stakeholders.

•	Organised & Self-Directed: Highly organised with strong time management skills; comfortable managing multiple prospects and tasks independently in a remote environment.

•	Tech Savvy: Comfortable with digital marketing channels, video conferencing tools, and productivity software.

•	Passion for Education: Genuine interest in children’s education, STEM, or technology learning programmes.



NICE TO HAVE

•	Experience in franchise development, licensing, or channel partnerships.

•	Background or network in the K-12 education, enrichment, or EdTech space.

•	Familiarity with coding, robotics, or STEM-related products or curricula.

•	Multilingual abilities to engage prospects across different markets.



WHAT WE OFFER

•	A fully remote, flexible work arrangement with a results-driven culture.

•	A meaningful role contributing to the growth of quality STEM education globally.

•	Competitive base salary with performance-based commissions and incentives.

•	Supportive team, clear processes, and the tools you need to succeed.

•	Opportunities for career growth as the franchise and licensing network expands.



HOW TO APPLY

Send your CV and a brief cover letter explaining why you’re excited about this role. Please include the subject line: “BD Manager — Franchise & Licensing”. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Corporate Sales Manager – Real Estate Solutions
description:
Job Position is BASED IN SINGAPORE




.sg



Full job description : 



Start Something Purposeful. 



At Urban Space Group , we believe in creating concepts that allow people, business and purpose to come together and thrive. We’re a privately owned real estate group dedicated to real estate concepts for industrial and commercial spaces. We are both owners of industrial properties, commercial shophouses and spaces, as well as operators of business models and concepts such as urbanspace self storage, Urbanpod workspace etc. 



We actively invest to expand our asset portfolio and grow our industrial and shophouse asset management capabilities and offerings.  



We’re looking for a Business Development and Sales Manager to bring our asset investment and management services to our clients, partners and stakeholders. 



Why Join Acuvest :



Your Mission :



To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork. 



This is a full-stack business development and sales role with plenty of room to use your skillsets in sales, strategy, innovation and execution. You’ll lead a motivated team and collaborate closely with other departments. You will report to the Business Development / Sales Director and play a critical role in the company’s performance. 



Why Join us :



- Mentored by management of a company with decades of experience in investment management, property management, development, and self-storage solutions across Singapore and the region. We combine strategic insight with innovation, offering real opportunities to grow and make an impact across a diversified real estate portfolio.



- Build an Elite Network: Connect directly with a high-value network of Corporate and SME business leaders / decision-makers, building a powerful network for your long-term career success. 



- Thrive in a High-Growth Self-Storage Sector. Our self-storage business, Co-working business space, E-commerce fulfilment hubs, serve both individual and corporate clients with flexible space solutions in a fast-rising market. You’ll be at the forefront of lead generation, networking, and deal closing—driving measurable results in an expanding industry.



- Collaborative Culture. Real Career Progression. Work with experienced professionals across property and investment teams, gain exposure to full deal cycles, build strong client relationships, and accelerate your career in sales and business development at Acuvest.



Full job description : What you will be doing



Property Leasing : 



- Develop and implement leasing strategies and initiatives to maximize occupancy, rental income, and tenant satisfaction 



- Identify leasing opportunities and prospective tenants that align with the positioning and target market of each property, and develop relationships with tenants and prospective tenants. 



- Negotiate lease agreements, including terms and conditions, rental rates, lease incentives, and lease renewals, and ensure compliance with company policies and industry standards. 



- Collaborate with property management teams to conduct market research and analysis, assess competitive landscape, and identify trends and opportunities in the property market. 



- Develop and maintain leasing budgets, forecasts, and reports, and track leasing activity, occupancy rates, and financial performance against targets and benchmarks. 



- Manage tenant relations and communication, including addressing tenant inquiries, resolving disputes, and ensuring tenant compliance with lease terms and property rules and regulations. 



- Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote our properties and attract potential tenants and partners. 



Self storage sales : 



- Work closely self storage sales team and management on drive the sales and occupancy of our self storage business. 



Property Investment : 



- Work closely with Management team to develop business opportunities for new property investment and development projects on a project basis. 



- Unlock Potential: Identify underutilized properties and devise creative strategies to maximize their value and utility



Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners. 



- Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. 



- An eagerness to learn and grow through hard work and dedication

title: 5–10 Year Career Path With Real Ownership RIGHT-HAND OPERATOR  AI POWER USER MARKETS INSIDER
description:
5–10 Year Career Path With Real Ownership



This role is designed for someone who wants to build, not bounce.



RIGHT-HAND OPERATOR — AI POWER USER — MARKETS INSIDER



Stocks | Forex | Crypto | Systems | Execution



This is a long-term, career-defining role for one exceptional individual.



We are not in a rush.

We are not filling a gap.

This position exists because the business is expanding — not because it needs saving.



If selected, you will become the right hand to a founder operating in markets, capital, automation, and media — with a 5–10 year horizon and meaningful upside.



?? READ THIS FIRST (IMPORTANT)



This role is not for:



General VAs



Task-takers



People “interested” in markets



People learning AI



People seeking short-term work



This role is for:



Someone who lives and breathes stocks, forex, or crypto



Someone who thinks in systems, leverage, and outcomes



Someone who uses AI as a daily operating system



Someone who wants to grow with a business, not hop jobs



If that’s not you, do not apply.



???? THE NON-NEGOTIABLE CORE



You must genuinely love markets.



This means:



You follow price, liquidity, narratives, macro, sentiment



You understand how traders think and talk



You are comfortable curating, summarizing, and discussing:



Stocks



Forex



Crypto



You can speak to this audience without pretending



This is paramount. Skills can be refined. Market obsession cannot be taught.



???? AI COMPETENCY (EXTREMELY HIGH BAR)



AI is not a tool here. It is infrastructure.



You must already be:



Highly fluent with ChatGPT



Comfortable with Claude and/or Gemini



Using AI daily for:



SOP creation



Content drafting and repurposing



Summaries and synthesis



Project planning



Internal documentation



You should think of AI as a co-worker, not a novelty.



????? YOUR ROLE (HIGH-LEVEL)



You will function as an Ops-First Right Hand, owning execution across:



Calendar & priority management



Project management and delivery



SOP creation and optimization



Social media operations (execution, not strategy)



Content curation and scheduling



Inbox and communication triage



Light GoHighLevel work (“GHL-lite”)



Coordination with specialists when needed



Your job is to make sure everything happens cleanly, on time, and without friction.



???? SOCIAL + CANVA (EXECUTIONAL)



You are expected to be:



Comfortable using Canva daily



Able to create clean, on-brand:



Quote graphics



Carousels



Thumbnails



Simple video covers



Confident managing posting and scheduling workflows



This is executional excellence, not influencer creativity.



???? COMPENSATION & LONG-TERM UPSIDE

???? Salary



$1,000/month during training



Scales up to $4,500/month based on:



Performance



Ownership



KPIs



Scope expansion



We are flexible on final compensation for the right person.



????? Annual Equipment Bonus



$2,000+ per year for computer / tech upgrades



???? Benefits (Philippines)



SSS



Health benefits



Stable, long-term employment



???? Long-Term Wealth Upside (SERIOUS)



This role includes long-term participation, not just salary.



After 5 years, the position may carry:



Up to $1,000,000 in stock, equity, and tokens



This is a 5–10 year seat



In the event of:



Company sale, or



Founder retirement



You will have the option (not obligation) to continue with the next phase or leadership — entirely your choice.



This is about building something meaningful, not extracting short-term income.



???? WHO WINS THIS ROLE



You are:



Extremely organized



Calm under pressure



Obsessed with clarity



Comfortable with authority and standards



Proactive without being chaotic



Loyal to missions, not titles



You want:



Stability



Growth



Proximity to decision-making



A future, not a gig



???? THE SELECTION PROCESS



Only shortlisted candidates will be invited to a paid skills test, including:



AI-based SOP creation



Market-related content curation



Project structuring



Communication clarity



We are selecting one person.

We will wait for excellence.



FINAL NOTE



This role is not urgent.

It is important.



If you are exceptional, you will recognize this opportunity immediately.



If you are not, you will self-select out.

title: Store sales executive
description:
Store Sales Executive – Wall Sculpture Art Boutique (Estancia Mall, Pasig)

We are looking for a Store Sales Executive who embodies elegance, patience, and a genuine love for art. If you appreciate classic style, enjoy meaningful conversations with clients, and take pride in creating a refined shopping experience, you may be the perfect fit for our Obella Home Art boutique in Estancia Mall.

About Obella Home Art

Obella Home Art specializes in premium wall sculptures and artistic home décor, offering timeless pieces that elevate any living space. Our store is a sanctuary for design lovers—calm, curated, and dedicated to craftsmanship.

What You’ll Do

•  Welcome clients with warmth, professionalism, and refined personal presentation

•  Guide customers through our collection of wall sculptures and décor pieces

•  Provide thoughtful recommendations based on client taste and home style

•  Maintain the store’s elegant ambiance and visual merchandising standards

•  Handle inquiries, sales transactions, and after?sales support

•  Build long-term client relationships through excellent communication and service

Who We’re Looking For

•  Someone who loves art, design, and beautiful spaces

•  Excellent communication skills—clear, polite, and confident

•  Patient and attentive when assisting clients

•  Classic, elegant personal style and behavior

•  Responsible, trustworthy, and proactive

•  Experience in retail or customer service is a plus, but passion and attitude matter most

What We Offer

We believe in taking care of our team. Our compensation package includes:

•  Competitive full salary package

•  Complete government-mandated benefits

•  Overtime pay

•  Supportive, respectful work environment

•  Opportunity to grow with a premium art and lifestyle brand

Work Location

Obella Home Art – Estancia Mall, Pasig City

How to Apply

Send your resume and a short introduction about yourself to:

title: Social media manager
description:
Finding the right social media manager is difficult.

Someone who does things the same way I would do them, with all my knowledge and experience of our program and our target audience internalized… but better. Of course that someone does not exist (yet!).



Plenty of people respond to my ads, but it’s hard to find that one right person. That person with the right skills, the right insights, and the right feeling for what we do.



Social media is a complex discipline. You do not learn this from a course, some online tips, or from experience in a previous position. You learn this by understanding the specific market and target audience, by working with results and numbers, and by analyzing what worked and what didn’t. To start all over again tomorrow, because the algorithms have changed.



A feeling for what we are doing is important. Also talent in authentic writing, good visual awareness, the ability to see what to post, when and where, and to monitor the results of your posts. This is where a certain talent comes in.



We are looking for a social media manager who fits this description.

The position is for 20 hours a week, including some tasks on weekends.

You can work from home and mostly plan your own working hours.

Payment is 15000 PHP/month, based on 20 hours/week.



About us:

Arcticterns.global is a non profit foundation that creates gatherings for traveling families to build community they often miss because of their lifestyle. We host month long programs in different countries, where families come together, connect, learn, and grow. Community is at the heart of everything we do.



Interested?

- Please send a cover letter in which you explain why you are interested and the skills that make you a strong fit for this role. Please make sure your authentic writing skills show in the cover letter and do not use AI.

- Please complete the IQ test and the DISC test this platform offers.

title: Motion Graphics Editor — NBA YouTube Documentaries (James Jani Style)
description:
NBA Insider (
) is a YouTube channel producing long-form NBA documentary-style video essays. We are hiring a full-time video editor to join us long-term with consistent, ongoing work.



=== THE STYLE WE'RE AFTER ===



Our #1 reference is James Jani: 

Watch any of his videos before applying. That is the quality and style we are going for.



Additional style references:

- Vox: 

- Johnny Harris: 



In short: cinematic, documentary-grade video essays with strong pacing, heavy motion graphics, and narrative tension. Think Netflix-level sports documentaries adapted for YouTube.



If you watch a James Jani video and think "I can edit like that" -- keep reading.



=== WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING ===



- Editing documentary-style NBA video essays (minimum 15 minutes per video) from voiceover, research docs, and creative briefs

- Sourcing all visuals yourself: archival NBA footage, game highlights, press photos, Getty Images, high-quality images, and any relevant media using fair use principles

- Creating motion graphics, animated text, kinetic typography, data visualizations, lower thirds, and transitions (this is a MAJOR part of the role -- not optional)

- Color grading and sound design to broadcast/cinematic standard

- Pacing and structuring edits to maintain narrative tension and viewer retention throughout the full video

- Working directly with the channel owner on creative direction for each video



Note: We do NOT provide raw footage. Your job is to source all visuals (B-roll, archival clips, images, photos) from the internet using fair use. You should be experienced in finding and curating high-quality visual material for documentary-style content.



=== MOTION GRAPHICS REQUIREMENT ===



This is non-negotiable. You MUST be highly skilled in After Effects (or equivalent motion graphics software). You need to be comfortable building from scratch: custom animations, kinetic text, data-driven visuals, dynamic transitions, and animated infographics. If motion graphics is not your strength, this role is not for you.



=== WHAT WE PROVIDE ===



- Artlist Max subscription (music, SFX, stock footage)

- Epidemic Sound subscription

- Voiceover audio for each video

- Research materials and scripts

- Clear creative briefs with references for each video

- Long-term, consistent work (we publish regularly)



=== REQUIRED SKILLS ===



- Expert-level video editing (Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve)

- Strong motion graphics and animation (After Effects or equivalent) -- NON-NEGOTIABLE

- Ability to source high-quality visuals, archival footage, and images independently using fair use

- Color grading and sound design

- Pacing and storytelling instinct (you know how to build tension and hold attention for 15+ minutes)

- Reliable high-speed internet connection and a capable editing workstation (you will be handling large project files)

- Strong English communication (written)



=== NICE TO HAVE ===



- Thumbnail design

- 3D motion graphics

- DaVinci Resolve proficiency

- Experience editing sports or documentary content

- Behance, personal website, or Vimeo profile with your work



=== COMPENSATION ===



25,500 PHP per video (equivalent to $600 CAD / $440 USD per video)



Payment is per completed video, paid promptly upon delivery. The more videos you complete, the more you earn. If your work is strong and consistent, there is no shortage of projects -- we publish regularly and are growing.



This is a long-term position with steady, ongoing work -- not a one-off gig.



=== TURNAROUND ===



Maximum 10 days per completed video. Ideal turnaround is 7 days. This includes weekends -- we operate on a delivery-based schedule, not a 9-to-5.



=== HOW TO APPLY ===



To be considered, you MUST include ALL of the following in your application. Incomplete applications will be ignored.



1. A link to your portfolio, showreel, Behance, Vimeo, or personal website -- specifically any documentary-style, James Jani-style, or motion graphics work you have done

2. Your best 60-second edit or reel that demonstrates your motion graphics and pacing ability

3. A short message (2-3 sentences): what editing software do you use, and what do you think makes James Jani's editing style effective?

4. Your expected rate per video in PHP



Applications without a portfolio link will NOT be reviewed.



=== WHAT HAPPENS AFTER YOU APPLY ===



Step 1: We review your portfolio and reel

Step 2: If your work matches what we are looking for, we will reach out to discuss the role

Step 3: Our top 2-3 candidates will be asked to complete a short PAID test edit (paid at a reduced rate) before final hiring



=== FAQ (READ BEFORE APPLYING) ===



Q: Is this a one-time project?

A: No. This is a long-term, full-time role with consistent work. The more videos you deliver, the more you earn.



Q: Do you provide raw footage?

A: No. You are responsible for sourcing all visuals (archival footage, game clips, photos, images) using fair use. We provide voiceover, scripts, research, and creative briefs.



Q: What software should I use?

A: Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve for editing. After Effects (or equivalent) for motion graphics.



Q: How will I receive project files?

A: We will share voiceover, scripts, and briefs via Google Drive.



Q: How will I get paid?

A: Via Payoneer, PayPal, or Wise -- whichever you prefer. Paid per video upon delivery.



Q: What is the expected turnaround per video?

A: Maximum 10 days per video. Ideal is 7 days.



Q: Do I need to be available during specific hours?

A: No fixed hours. We care about quality and meeting deadlines. That said, you should be responsive on messaging during reasonable hours for communication.



Q: How long are the videos?

A: Minimum 15 minutes. Most videos will be 15-25 minutes.

 subscriber capture

Reference:

title: AI-Powered Video Editor (Direct Response & E-com Ads)
description:
## Job Title: Fast Video Editor for Ecom Ads (AI Tools Required)



### About the Role



We are a fast-growing DTC brand in the Kids / Education space, and we produce a lot of ads every week.



We believe **creative volume = revenue**, so we are looking for a fast editor who can help us run our Ad Factory.



This is not a slow editing job.

We need someone who can produce ads every day using AI tools and work independently.



If you are slow, this job is not for you.

If you are fast and consistent, this can be a long-term job.



---



### Your Daily Goal



* Produce around **5 minutes of finished footage per day**

* This can include:



  * VSL edits

  * UGC ads

  * Hook variations

  * Short ad variations



You must be able to:



* Deliver drafts in 24–48 hours

* Generate your own clips using AI tools

* Generate AI voiceovers

* Add captions

* Follow example ads exactly

* Work without being spoon-fed



We care about **ads that convert**, not cinematic editing.



---



### Important — AI Clip Generation (No B-Roll Needed)



You do NOT need to find stock footage.



You will generate clips yourself using AI tools such as:



* HeyGen

* Veo

* Kling

* Nanobanana / image-to-video tools

* ElevenLabs (voice)

* CapCut / Premiere / After Effects



You must have experience with **at least 2 of these AI tools**.



This job is for fast AI editors, not traditional editors.



---



### Requirements



* Experience with E-commerce / Direct Response ads

* Experience with at least 2 AI tools listed above

* Can work fast every day

* Can send daily updates on 

* Looking for long-term work

* Can follow instructions exactly



---



### Pay



* $1,000 USD per month

* Paid weekly ($250/week)

* Bonuses for winning ads



This is a long-term position.

Strong editors will be promoted to **Senior Editor**, and top performers can grow into a **Creative Strategist role with performance-based pay and bonuses**.



We reward people who help us create winning ads and scale the brand.



---



### Trial Process (Read Carefully)



Step 1 — Unpaid Test

You will make **one 30-second video**



You must:



* Copy our example video 1:1

* We give you the script

* Script will be slightly different

* Same style, pacing, and format



This is to test your speed and accuracy.



Step 2 — Paid Trial ($30)

If your test is good, you will do a paid trial and receive **$30 for the trial edit**.



Step 3 — Hire

If the paid trial is good, you will be hired full-time.



---



### How to Apply



Start your message with:



**CUSTOMER FIRST**



Then send:



1. Portfolio (Ecom ads only)

2. List of AI tools you use

3. Confirm you can make 5 minutes of footage per day

4. Confirm you are ok with $1,000/month + bonus

5. Confirm you are ready to start the test



If you are ready, write:



**CUSTOMER FIRST — READY FOR TEST**



Applications without this will be ignored.

title: Fabrication (SMP)- Production Planner
description:
ESTIMATOR / PLANNER — SMP & Fabrication Focus

Full-Time, Long-Term | Remote (Philippines) | 38 hrs/week AEST | Reports to: Project Manager



THE OPPORTUNITY

This is not a short-term contract or a task-based role. We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who wants to build a genuine career alongside a growing Australian engineering business — someone who takes ownership, communicates proactively, and becomes an integral part of how we win and deliver work.

As our Estimator / Planner, you will sit at the intersection of commercial and operational activity — reviewing client drawings, calculating material requirements, engaging Australian vendors, and building the production schedules that keep our fabrication workshop moving on time.

You bring the engineering foundation. We will invest in training you on our specific machinery, freight logistics, and internal systems. In return, we expect commitment, precision, and a standard of work our clients can rely on.



WHAT WE OFFER



Above-market salary — top tier of Philippine compensation

Formal employment via EOR — full statutory benefits (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG, 13th month)

Annual performance review with clear career progression

100% remote / work from home

Named tea
mber — fully integrated into our operations, not an anonymous contractor

Direct access to senior leadership

Structured onboarding and ongoing training investment



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Estimating & Material Takeoffs



Review and interpret client drawings and specifications across structural steel, mechanical, and piping disciplines

Perform accurate material takeoffs from IFC drawings and fabrication packages

Calculate surface preparation and coating/painting requirements

Prepare and issue RFQs to Australian material suppliers and subcontractors

Compile estimate data to support finalisation of client proposals



Procurement & Logistics Coordination



Coordinate material purchasing to ensure on-time delivery, accounting for regional freight lead times

Liaise with Australian vendors via
 and phone to confirm orders, track deliveries, and manage exceptions

Maintain accurate procurement registers and flag schedule risks early

Training provided on freight routes, preferred carriers, and lead time norms specific to our operation



Production & Workshop Scheduling



Develop and maintain workshop production schedules based on material availability, job priority, and machine capacity

Coordinate with the workshop supervisor and Project Manager to sequence fabrication activities

Track schedule adherence and provide regular status updates

Training provided on our specific machinery capabilities and fabrication workflow constraints





CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS

Essential:



Proven background in Structural, Mechanical, and/or Piping (SMP) engineering, steel fabrication, or a closely related discipline — you must understand how structures and piping systems are built and documented

Superior written and spoken English — you will correspond directly with Australian clients, engineers, and suppliers daily

Strong mathematical and analytical aptitude for precise quantity takeoffs and cost estimation

Minimum 3 years' relevant experience in a fabrication, construction, or heavy engineering environment

Proficiency with Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Chat)

Reliable high-speed internet and a professional home office setup



Highly Regarded:



Experience with quantity takeoffs from structural steel, pipe spool, or pressure vessel drawings

Familiarity with Australian standards (AS3678, AS3679, AS4041)

Knowledge of industrial coating specifications — blast profiles, paint systems, DFT requirements

Basic CAD proficiency (AutoCAD or similar)

Experience with fabrication ERP or job management systems

OFW experience in Gulf, Korean yard, or PNG resources/fabrication sector





TECHNOLOGY & TOOLS



Communication: Google Chat, Gmail, Google Meet

Documents & Data: Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

Production Activities: Fulcrum Pro (training provided)



HOW TO APPLY

Please send us:



Your current CV in English with a clear summary of your SMP and fabrication experience

A brief cover note (3–5 sentences) explaining what specific experience you bring and why this role interests you

Your salary expectations (PHP per month)



Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a video interview. In-person meetings available in Manila from 20-26 March

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Cinematic & Instagram)
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor (Cinematic & Instagram) — Luxury Brand

SALARY: $800–1,000 USD/month (based on portfolio)

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver overlap (PST) for feedback



---



THE MISSION



Prismiera is a luxury jewelry brand built on ancient mythology, goddess archetypes, and Dark Academia aesthetics.



We need someone to own how the brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



You'll produce short-form content that makes a woman feel powerful in under 30 seconds. Cinematic pacing, dark femininity, sometimes music-driven editing — designed for how Instagram and TikTok audiences actually consume. You'll also work with our AI-generated personas, integrating them into edits and cinematic storytelling as the visual anchor of the brand.



We're hiring for Taste first. Your edits/videos make people feel something before they understand what they're looking at.



---



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Cinematic Storytelling. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. High-production value.



NO: CapCut presets. Generic motivational quote reels. Low-effort vlog-style acting. Anything that cheapens a demi-luxury product.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between aspirational and try-hard. Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Edit & Create: Produce original Instagram Reels and TikToks — cinematic, atmospheric visuals, mythology, history, modern. Some pieces you'll build from scratch. Others you'll adapt from assets in our YouTube production pipeline. Either way, you're crafting content shaped for how each platform rewards engagement.



Music-Sync Editing: Sometimes, your cuts, transitions, and visual reveals are married to the beat. Swells, drops, silence, impact — all intentional. Music is a storytelling weapon, not background noise.



AI Persona Integration: Composite and stylize our AI-generated goddess characters into edits/videos. She's the visual anchor — the face the eye locks onto while mythology and editing layers move around her. You'll make her feel like she belongs in the scene, not pasted on top of it.



AI Content Generation: You won't just receive AI assets — you'll learn to create them. We provide paid accounts for frontier AI tools (Seedance 2.0, Seedream5, and whatever launches next). You'll generate AI influencer visuals, atmospheric environments, and character footage that feed directly into your edits/videos. Prior AI experience is a plus, not a requirement — we train the right editor.



Platform Instinct: You understand what gets saved on Instagram. What gets looped on TikTok. You design for those behaviors, not just for visual quality.



Volume at Speed: Once your templates and aesthetic are locked, we expect high output. You'll ramp up from 3-5 pieces per week to 10-15 at steady state.



---



CORE REQUIREMENTS



The Aesthetic Eye. This is non-negotiable. Your portfolio should make us stop scrolling. If your work already lives in the neighborhood of cinematic, aspirational — we want to talk.



Creative Instinct. You don't wait to be told what to make. Given a goddess/character, a mood, and a piece of music, you see the edit before you open the timeline. You pitch ideas, not just execute briefs. Storytelling comes naturally — you think in narrative beats, not just cuts.



Music & Rhythm. You've made edits where the music drives the visuals — AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits, whatever the genre. You understand pacing as a weapon.



Premiere Pro. Your primary editing tool. You're fast, clean, and comfortable working in shared project structures.



Loop Thinking. You design edits/videos that reward rewatching. The cut that lands on beat, the detail you only catch the second time, the seamless loop point. You think in circles, not lines.



Strong English. Daily async communication — clear, direct, professional. This matters as much as your editing. Responsiveness and clarity are non-negotiable.



Reliable & Coachable. You hit deadlines or warn early. You take direct feedback and iterate fast. You flag problems with options, not excuses.



---



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, But We'll Notice — And They Affect Your Rate)



- After Effects — compositing, layering, motion graphics, light/shadow matching. This is how AI-generated visuals get integrated into polished edits. Strong AE skills will place you at the higher end of our compensation range.

- AI generation experience — Kling3.0, Veo3.1, Comfyui, Seedance2.0, Seedream5.0 or similar. If you already know these tools, your rate reflects it. If not, we provide paid accounts and training.

- Color grading — pushing mixed footage into a consistent luxury palette

- Typography sense — text overlays that feel intentional and premium

- Sound design — SFX layering beyond just music (risers, hits, atmospheric texture)

- Understanding of Instagram analytics — saves, shares, completion rates

- Experience building visual identities for brands or personas on social media



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media (sometimes YouTube as well). Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run Premiere Pro and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



PAID TRIAL (Shortlisted Candidates)



Before any full-time commitment, we run a paid trial. We provide real assets, style references, and the AI persona visuals. You deliver content.



Trial is compensated at $150 USD at the end of each week. For select candidates, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 USD for a single deliverable.



If it's a mutual fit after 30 days, you transition to confirmed status with bi-weekly payments at your assessed rate — paid before work. Prepayment is earned through the trial, not given on day one.



This protects both sides — you see whether the work fits your strengths, we see whether the output fits our brand.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- Paid accounts for all frontier AI tools — we provide the tools, you bring the talent

- AI training — you'll learn to generate content with cutting-edge tools as part of your workflow, even if you've never touched them before

- Creative ownership — you're defining how a luxury brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok from day one

- Clear briefs — asset libraries, mood references, and specific direction for every batch

- Direct feedback — specific, constructive notes on every edit

- Rate growth — your compensation grows as your capabilities do. We invest in editors who invest in the work.

- A brand worth building — you're not joining a finished machine, you're helping build one. We're looking for long-term commitment.



---



COMPENSATION



$800–1,000 USD/month based on experience. Editors with stronger technical skills (After Effects, AI generation) start at the higher end. We assess your rate based on your portfolio, not your résumé.



After confirmed hire: bi-weekly payments, paid before work.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic cover letter.

Use 7 apply points or more when applying.



Subject line: PRISMIERA EDITOR — [Your Name]



Send the following (in this order):



1. Your Best Work. Link to ONE video that showcases your creativity, editing execution, and aesthetic taste. This should be the piece you're most proud of — the one that makes people stop scrolling.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE edit where the music drives the visuals. Show us your beat-sync instinct. (Can overlap with #1 if one video demonstrates both.)



3. The Luxury Test. In 3-5 bullets, how do you make an edit feel "expensive" instead of "cheap"?



4. The Creative Instinct Test (3-5 sentences). You're given a 45-second cinematic video about a queen who poisoned her entire court, a folder of our AI Goddess visuals, and a dark atmospheric beat. Pitch a 15-second Instagram Reel designed to get saved — tell us your audio choice, pacing, and what the first 2 seconds look like.



5. Hardware. Your PC specs: CPU / GPU / RAM. Plus your internet upload speed.



6. Turnaround Estimate. Given existing footage, a music track, and an established editing template — how long would a 15-20 second piece take you? How long would a 45 second Cinematic AI video take you?



7. The Rewrite. Rewrite this sentence to sound dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."



Looking forward to meeting and working with you!

title: VA Project & Admin Specialist
description:
SUMMARY

We’re looking for someone smart, organized, and excited to grow with us! If you’re a positive, detail-oriented person who loves to learn, takes feedback well, and wants to be part of a close-knit, supportive team — we’d love to meet you.



This is a long-term role for someone who’s ready to take on more responsibility over time and become a key part of our journey.



Who We Are:

I
dia (i
) is a family-run real estate media company based in Montreal, Canada. We create amazing photo and video content for real estate professionals, and we’re known for our fast turnaround, friendly service, and high-quality work. Our team is growing quickly, and we’re passionate about doing great work and loving the team we work with.

If you’re looking for a place where your ideas matter, you’ll be supported, and you can grow — this might be the perfect fit.



JOB SUMMARY

title: VIDEO EDITOR  DIGITAL-FIRST REAL ESTATE (AI + REAL FOOTAGE HYBRID)
description:
We are looking for a highly capable video editor who can blend real estate footage with modern AI tools without sacrificing authenticity.



This is not a generic editing role. Our content must feel authoritative, sharp, and real while using AI strategically to enhance storytelling.



ABOUT THE ROLE

You will be editing short-form property and brand content for a fast-growing digital-first real estate business. The goal is simple: create clean, high-impact videos that build trust with buyers, vendors, and investors.



You must know how to use AI as a tool, not as a crutch.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

• Edit short-form vertical videos for Meta, TikTok, Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts

• Work with real phone footage, drone clips and walk-through visuals

• Use Nano Banana Pro (or similar) for image enhancement and visual polishing

• Use Kling AI (or similar) for motion effects, hooks and transitions

• Maintain a “real-first, cinematic-second” editing style

• Deliver fast turnaround with consistent visual standards



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• Strong experience editing real estate, property or authority-based content

• Understanding of short-form attention hooks (first 3 seconds matter)

• Ability to enhance footage without making it look artificial

• Clean typography, modern pacing, confident visual storytelling

• Experience with AI video tools is essential



IMPORTANT OUR STYLE

We are NOT looking for overly animated or fake-looking edits.



Most of the video must be grounded in real footage. AI visuals are used only to:

• create strong opening hooks

• add cinematic transitions

• enhance suburb or map visuals

• elevate branding 
nts



If your work looks like generic AI ads, this role is not for you.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

• Videos feel premium but authentic

• Authority and trust come first

• Consistent editing style across multiple property campaigns

• Fast, reliable delivery without constant revisions



Include your WhatsApp number below, shortlisted applicants will receive a direct message with further details.

title: Instagram DM Sales Closer (Christian Apparel Brand)
description:
Love of God is a rapidly growing Christian clothing brand built on impact, excellence, and authenticity. We’re not just selling apparel — we’re building a movement rooted in faith, depth, and real connection.



We’re looking for a high-performing DM Sales Closer who knows how to build genuine relationships through Instagram and
 messaging — and turn conversations into customers.



This is not entry-level support.



This is relationship-driven sales.



The Role



You will manage conversations through Instagram and
 
 using Meta Business Suite.



Your mission:



• Build trust

• Create real connection

• Handle objections confidently

• Guide conversations toward a natural close



This starts as a part-time position (10–20 hours per week) with room to grow as revenue scales.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



• Responding quickly and professionally to inbound DMs

• Starting conversations with warm followers when appropriate

• Building genuine rapport (no robotic copy-paste responses)

• Answering product questions clearly and confidently

• Handling objections like “It’s too expensive” or “I’ll think about it”

• Following up with warm leads who haven’t purchased

• Tracking conversations and sales generated

• Increasing overall DM conversion rates



Requirements



You must have:



• Excellent written English (natural, conversational tone)

• Proven sales experience (chat or call closing preferred)

• Customer support experience

• Strong emotional intelligence

• Confidence in persuasion without being aggressive

• Reliable internet connection

• Availability that overlaps with U.S. daytime hours



Bonus points if you:



• Have worked with eCommerce brands

• Understand Instagram culture and buyer psychology

• Have experience inside Meta Business Suite

• Have worked in commission-based roles



Compensation



This is a performance-based role.



• Base Pay: $1–$4 per hour (based on experience)

• Commission: 5-8% of sales generated from your tracked conversations



We average $400 a day revenue in sales from ads alone.



Hours will begin at 10–20 per week and expand as traffic and sales grow.



High performers will earn increased commission and expanded responsibility.



Growth Path



Top performers can grow into:



• Lead DM Closer

• Sales Team Manager

• Community Growth Lead



We reward performance — not tenure.



How to Apply



Please answer the following:



What sales experience do you have?



Have you ever closed a sale through chat? Describe your process.



How would you respond to:

• “I love it, but it’s too expensive.”

• “I’ll think about it.”

title: Data Logger - Video Game Sales Company
description:
We are hiring someone to review recorded livestream footage and log sales for a high-volume retro video game business. You will watch livestream recordings and document each item sold, including details like price, condition, color, and item type. This role requires excellent English comprehension, strong attention to detail, and a deep understanding of video games and gaming consoles.



Responsibilities:

Review 8–12 hours of livestream footage each day. Identify every item sold during the stream and log the sale. Record details such as item name, console or system, game title or accessory type, color variant, condition, sale price, and any relevant notes. You will be responsible for logging between 500 and 1000 sales per day. All data must be organized clearly and entered accurately into a spreadsheet or database.



Requirements:

Expert-level English comprehension is required because you must understand fast spoken English during livestreams. Strong knowledge of video games and consoles is required, including Nintendo, PlayStation, Xbox, and retro systems. You must be familiar with games, controllers, consoles, and accessories. This role requires excellent attention to detail, strong focus while watching long video recordings, and the ability to handle a high-responsibility role with accuracy and consistency.



Ideal Candidate:

The ideal candidate is passionate about video games, organized, consistent, and comfortable with repetitive but detail-focused work. You must take accuracy and responsibility seriously.



How to Apply:

Please include your experience with video games or gaming hardware, your favorite gaming console, and a short explanation of why you think you would be a good fit for this role. Applications without these answers may not be considered.

title: AI Content Automation Architect (Video, E-commerce, Social Pipelines)
description:
Overview:

Metaone Group is a high-speed, fully remote AI-First Automation Agency and Media Company. We do not do things manually. We build machines. We are currently building a fully automated "Content Factory" to mass-produce digital media, and we need a highly technical AI Content Automation Architect to build the pipelines.



If you know how to connect AI scriptwriters to AI video generators, and automatically route that content to social media and e-commerce platforms, we want you on our team.



The Role:

You will be the core technical builder of our AI media pipelines. Your goal is to make AI do 90% of the work. You will use custom scripts, APIs, and automation platforms to chain together AI tools so they automatically generate and publish high-volume content for our internal brands and external clients.



Key Responsibilities:



AI Short Drama & Video Pipelines: Build automated workflows that take a text prompt/script and run it through AI voiceover (ElevenLabs, etc.) and AI video/image generators (Midjourney, Runway, HeyGen, Jimeng) to assemble short-form video content.



E-commerce Automation: Create pipelines that automatically generate product descriptions, marketing copy, and AI-enhanced product images, pushing them directly into our e-commerce campaigns.



Day-to-Day Social Media Autopilot: Build automated systems that generate daily social media posts (copy + visuals) for multiple companies and automatically schedule/post them across different platforms.



API Chaining & Integration: Connect large language models (like ChatGPT/Claude) with media generation APIs and our enterprise workspace (Lark).



System Architecture: Map out the technical blueprint of these workflows so our creative team (Prompt Engineers) can easily plug their ideas into your automated machine.



Requirements:



Proven experience building complex automations (
, Zapier, or custom Python/Node.js scripts).



Deep understanding of API integrations, specifically working with AI image, video, and text generation endpoints.



Experience with auto-posting tools and social media APIs (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, etc.).



A proactive "builder" mindset—you don't wait for a tutorial; you figure out how to automate the workflow.



Excellent English communication skills (written and video).

We are looking for an AI Content Production Specialist to join our creative engine. If you have solid design and video editing skills, a highly trainable mindset, and a passion for learning how to use AI tools (like Midjourney, Canva AI, and ChatGPT) to create content at scale, we want you on our team.



The Role:

You will be the hands-on creator for our digital media pipelines. Instead of designing one post from scratch, you will learn to use "modular prompts" to generate batches of videos, images, and marketing copy. You will take raw AI generations and polish them into final, brand-ready assets for our global campaigns (including AI short dramas and e-commerce).



Key Responsibilities:



AI Content Generation: Use tools like ChatGPT, Midjourney, and Jimeng (we will train you on our exact workflows) to generate high volumes of images and video clips.



Graphic Design & Assembly: Use Canva to format AI-generated images into clean, consistent social media posts and e-commerce product graphics.



Video Editing: Use CapCut (or similar software) to piece together AI video clips, add automated voiceovers, and format short-form content (TikToks, Reels, Shorts).



Prompt Testing: Follow our templates and test new prompts to see what generates the best visual results.



File Organization: Keep all generated assets perfectly organized in our shared workspace (Lark/Google Drive) so our Regional Managers can review them.



Requirements:



Solid experience in Graphic Design (Canva) and Video Editing (CapCut, Premiere, etc.).



Basic familiarity with ChatGPT or other generative AI tools, and a strong desire to become an expert prompt engineer.



A proactive, fast learner—you follow instructions perfectly but aren't afraid to test new ideas.



Excellent visual eye for modern social media trends.



Good English communication skills.



Ability to work standard Philippine daytime hours.

title: Bookkeeping, Accounts Payable, Revenue Reconciliation
description:
Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & QuickBooks

Record financial transactions in QuickBooks

Maintain accurate general ledger entries

Match bank and credit card transactions to the correct expenses

Ensure all transactions are categorized correctly

Maintain organized digital records of receipts and invoices

Assist with monthly bookkeeping and financial organization



Accounts Payable (AP)



Enter vendor invoices into QuickBooks

Verify invoice accuracy and supporting documentation

Track invoice due dates and maintain an organized payable schedule

Ensure expenses are coded correctly by category and property

Identify potential duplicate invoices or payments before processing



Accounts Receivable (AR)



Record incoming payments and deposits

Ensure deposits are recorded correctly in QuickBooks

Track outstanding balances when applicable

Apply payments to the correct accounts



Hotel Revenue Reconciliation



Reconcile daily hotel revenue reports against deposits

Verify that reported revenue matches deposits in bank accounts

Review credit card batches, OTA payments, and merchant deposits

Identify discrepancies between reported revenue and deposits

Flag missing or incorrect deposits for review



Bank & Transaction Reconciliation



Match bank and credit card transactions to recorded expenses

Reconcile bank accounts and financial statements

Investigate discrepancies or missing transactions

Ensure all financial activity is accurately recorded



Vendor Invoice Review



Review vendor invoices for accuracy before entry

Identify duplicate invoices or duplicate payment risks

Maintain organized vendor records

Flag unusual vendor charges or inconsistencies



Expense Monitoring



Review expenses for unusual increases or inconsistencies

Flag unexpected spikes in categories such as utilities, maintenance, or vendor costs

Compare expenses against historical spending patterns



Monthly Property Financial Summary

Prepare a simple monthly financial summary for each property including:



Total revenue

Total expenses

Estimated NOI

Deposit discrepancies

Unusual expenses or vendor payments

Notes on financial inconsistencies or items requiring review



Required Skills



Strong experience using QuickBooks

Excellent numerical and analytical ability

Extremely detail-oriented

Strong organizational skills

Ability to reconcile financial data accurately

Ability to identify discrepancies in financial records

Ability to work independently and follow structured processes

Strong spreadsheet skills (Excel or Google Sheets)



Preferred Experience



Bookkeeping or accounting support experience

Experience with hotel or hospitality accounting

Experience reconciling daily revenue or financial reports

Familiarity with financial reconciliation processes



Ideal Candidate



Highly disciplined with numbers and financial data

Notices small discrepancies others miss

Organized and methodical with financial records

Reliable and consistent with data accuracy

Comfortable working independently with financial systems

title: AI Agent & Automation Expert (Remote | Full Time)
description:
We are looking for an AI Automation Expert who can build real, reliable, end-to-end AI solutions that improve efficiency, reduce manual work, and support our SEO, operations, and internal processes.



This role is for someone who has already built working AI agents, automation systems, and integrated workflows using LLMs, APIs, webhooks, and automation tools. We want someone who understands how to architect solutions, not just someone who can write prompts.



You must be able to show proof of automations you have personally built that solve business problems, streamline repetitive work, or improve output speed and accuracy.



?



What You Will Work On



• Designing and building AI-driven automations that support SEO work, reporting, content processing, audit workflows, data collection, and repeated operational tasks

• Creating AI agents that can handle multi-step workflows without constant human involvement

• Integrating LLMs with APIs, databases, task systems, and internal tools

• Improving the speed and quality of existing workflows using custom automation logic

• Identifying bottlenecks and proposing AI-powered or automation-powered solutions

• Maintaining, updating, and improving existing tools and agents



?



Requirements



• Proven experience building working AI agents or automation systems

• Strong understanding of LLMs, API integrations, and workflow automation

• Ability to design structured, multi-step workflows using tools like Python, Node, Zapier, Make, or custom solutions

• Ability to troubleshoot, refine, and optimize automations for reliability

• Experience with SEO-related automations is a plus but not required

• Strong problem-solving mindset and the ability to work independently

• Clear communication and organized documentation habits



?



Nice to Have



• Experience with vector databases, embeddings, and retrieval workflows

• Experience building internal tools or dashboards

• Familiarity with Chrome automation, scraping, or structured data extraction

• Familiarity with cloud hosting or serverless environments



?



What We Offer



• Full-time remote role

• Long-term stability and ongoing projects

• Competitive compensation based on skill level and experience

• Flexible work environment with clear expectations

• Opportunities to design high-impact solutions that shape real operations



?



How to Apply



Please apply with the following:



• Links, videos, repositories, or examples of AI agents or automations you have built

• A short explanation of what each solution does and how it works

• Your updated resume or OnlineJobs.ph profile



Applications without proof of past automation work will not be considered.

title: AI Developer & Automation Specialist
description:
We are a fast-paced e-commerce company looking for a versatile AI Developer to build and manage our internal automated systems. We prioritize speed and execution, we need someone who can rapidly develop functional tools and workflows that solve immediate operational bottlenecks. The ideal candidate is a technical "all-rounder" who is deeply familiar with the current AI landscape and can deploy solutions using both no-code and custom-coded environments.



Key Responsibilities:

- System Development: Build and maintain internal dashboards and custom tool portals to centralize our team's AI resources.

- Workflow Automation: Design and manage complex automated sequences using n8n or Zapier to connect marketing, creative, and logistics data.

- AI Integration: Implement and optimize the latest models (Claude, GPT-4o) and agentic frameworks (OpenClaw/Clawdbot) into our daily business processes.

- Rapid Prototyping: Turn operational needs into working internal applications immediately. We value functional tools that work now over "perfect" systems that take weeks to build.

- Tech Stack Management: Manage API integrations, webhooks, and database connections to ensure seamless data flow across the company.



Technical Requirements:

- Experience: Minimum 1+ years of proven experience in AI automation and systems development.

- Automation Mastery: Advanced proficiency in n8n (preferred) or Zapier.

- AI Fluency: Up-to-date with the latest developments in the AI market, including Anthropic’s Claude, agentic workflows, and the OpenClaw ecosystem.

- Development Skills: Able to work with APIs, JSON, and basic scripting (JavaScript or Python) to extend automation beyond standard features.

- Fast-Paced Execution: Proven ability to work in high-pressure environments where speed of delivery is a primary metric.

title: Pinterest Growth Specialist (Remote/Part-Time)
description:
Company: The Foreign Fork LLC 

Reports to: Alexandria Ulmer

Role Type: Freelance / Part-Time (approx 10 hours per week)

Role Overview

We are looking for a Pinterest Growth Specialist to take ownership of our Pinterest presence. Your primary goal is to drive consistent, high-volume traffic to our blog by identifying top-performing content, creating high-quality "Fresh Pins," and managing a year-long scheduling strategy. You will be responsible for taking our most successful recipes and turning them into a visual engine for growth.



Key Responsibilities

1. Data Analysis & Strategy

Conduct weekly audits of Pinterest Analytics to identify high-performing content based on Outbound Clicks.

Monitor the performance of the "Top 30 Days" and "Top 90 Days" to determine which recipes need "Fresh Pin" variations.

Track pin creation progress in an editorial calendar or spreadsheet to ensure no top-performing post is overlooked.



2. Content Creation (Graphic Design)

Produce a minimum of 5 high-quality pin variations for every top-performing blog post.

Utilize and adapt existing templates (Canva or similar) to maintain a fast, efficient "drag-and-drop" workflow.

Experiment with diverse color palettes, bold typography, and layout styles to determine what resonates with our audience.

Ensure all creative assets include the company URL and branding to protect intellectual property.



3. SEO & Board Management

Optimize Pinterest boards with keyword-rich descriptions and categorized titles.

Perform keyword research using the Pinterest search bar and "keyword bubbles" to inform pin titles and descriptions.

Utilize AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT) to generate 5+ unique, SEO-optimized captions and titles for each pin variation.



4. Advanced Scheduling (Tailwind)

Manage the Tailwind queue to ensure a consistent daily posting volume (20+ pins/day).

Execute a long-term "Interval Strategy": spacing out pin variations over 7-day intervals and scheduling them months in advance to ensure content longevity.

Manage distributions to both personal boards and high-performing group boards.



Required Skills & Experience

Pinterest Expert: Deep understanding of the Pinterest algorithm, "Fresh Pin" requirements, and Pinterest Analytics.

Tailwind Proficiency: Experience with Tailwind’s "Original Publisher," "Interval Scheduling," and "SmartLoop" features.

Graphic Design: Proficiency in Canva (or similar tools) with a "good eye" for food/lifestyle aesthetics and complementary font pairings.

SEO & AI Literacy: Ability to identify high-ranking keywords and use AI to streamline the creation of descriptions and titles.

Organization: Must be able to self-manage a high volume of assets and keep a detailed log of what has been pinned.



Qualities We’re Looking For

Efficiency: You can "fire hose" through a list of recipes and turn them into beautiful pins quickly.

Growth-Minded: You enjoy looking at the "needle" and finding ways to move it through experimentation.

Independent: Once you understand the workflow, you can run the Pinterest account with minimal oversight.

description:
[About the Role]

We are a premium K-Beauty brand specializing in professional aesthetic and anti-aging skincare (Wrinkle Tox 5D Shot). We are looking for a high-performing TikTok Shop Affiliate Outreach Manager to scale our US presence. The ideal candidate has a proven track record of identifying top-tier skincare influencers and driving significant revenue through strategic partnerships.



[Key Responsibilities]



- Massive Outreach & Discovery:** Identify and reach out to 2,000+ targeted skincare influencers per month.

- Precise Targeting:** Focus on influencers within the skincare/beauty niche who have generated over $5,000 in revenue in the last 30 days.

- End-to-End Communication:** Manage all communications via TikTok DM,
, and SNS. Craft personalized, high-converting invitation messages.

- Creative Guidance: Provide influencers with "Creative Hooks" and "Visual Guides" to ensure their content aligns with our premium aesthetic image and drives sales.

- Post Management: Monitor sample delivery, track upload status, and proactively encourage influencers to post high-quality content on time.

- Reporting: Maintain a daily/weekly tracker of outreach volume, response rates, and GMV performance.



[Qualifications]



- Experience:Minimum 1-2 years of direct experience in US TikTok Shop Affiliate management (Experience in the beauty/skincare industry is a huge plus).

- Full-Time Commitment: Ability to work 8 hours a day (aligned with US or KST time zone as discussed).

- Communication: Native-level written English with the ability to build rapport with influencers.

- Data-Driven: Proficient in TikTok analytics tools (e.g., KaloData, FastMoss, EchoTik).

- Proactive Attitude: A self-starter who doesn't just "send messages" but "closes deals" and drives revenue.



[Performance Bonus & Perks]



- Competitive base salary.

- Performance-based Incentives: Additional bonuses for reaching GMV targets and high-performing video uploads.

- Opportunity to lead our expansion into the Southeast Asian (SEA) TikTok Shops for top performers.
